title: Wobbly Whisker's Sticky Adventure on Planet Mooker
summary: After a potion mix-up, Wobbly Whisker the kitten finds herself stuck on the slimy Planet of the Mookers. Lost and covered in goo, she is rescued by Buddy the Mouse and Seeker, who take her back to their castle. While the heroes journey back to the Mooker library to find Mama Kitten—encountering giant fossils and a helpful librarian—the restless kitten accidentally covers the castle rug in slime. Reunited at last, Mama Kitten leads Wobbly Whisker home for a long-awaited bath and a night of squirmies.

highlightQuote.text: I'm Wobbly Whisker and I can't find my mommy again.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: All right, you ready for a quick Stars and Stories?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Can you turn the light out please?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'm going to turn out the light. Five, four, three, two...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong sissa.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Ding dong what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Ding dong sissaseeker!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Seeker says, "Who is it?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It's Buddy the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh hi, Buddy the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then can I try the new potion we made? I want to do the new potion that I made.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh you want to try that one again? The one we took just a little while earlier. Where did that one take us to?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The Mookers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh that was the Planet of the Mookers. You want to go back there again?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh okay. We had a good time there. We could go again. Anything in particular you want to do while we're there?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well let's just have a sip. Ready? (Sipping sounds). Okay, say the rhyme.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then someone said "mew" inside the bottle.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Mew? Oh. Who's in this potion bottle?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then all of a sudden it fell off sticky goo.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Who are you, sticky goo person?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm Wobbly Whisker and I can't find my mommy again.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Again? Where do you think she went?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But I'm so slimy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh let's give you a little bath.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I think going to the Planet of the Mookers and then I figured out that it was so slimy there and I decided to go home but the potion didn't take me there.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The potion didn't take you home?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah. The same potion that I went to. I went to the Planet of the Mookers then I couldn't find my mom.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then we found your mom in the library.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then I couldn't find my mom then I figured out it was so slimy went back to find the potion bottle went to the Planet of the Mookers and it just didn't take me home.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Buddy the Mouse, what do you think we should do?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Just look for mommy.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, you're right Buddy. That's the first thing to do. But where do you think her mommy is?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: We were playing on the Mookers planet so let's go, but when you find her I'll be waiting at your castle, said Wobbly Whisker, okay?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: You're going to stay here? Okay, well the bathroom's over there. You can give yourself a bath if you wanted to.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, but I don't want to be getting my fur all wet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well how are you going to get clean?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: My mom always gives me a bath once I go home because it's real grass from your house.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh okay. Well Buddy and I will go find her for you and we'll come back. Um, there's snacks in the kitchen if you want. You can have anything you want. Okay, and then Seeker...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Is there any kibble? Mew, mew, mew, mew, mew! Mew, mew! Mew, mew! said Wobbly Whisker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What are you mewing about now? said Seeker.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I was just trying to say is there any kibble?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh kibble. No I'm sorry I don't have any kibble here.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Well I just brought a whole bag of it.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh you did? That's good. You're lucky. So have a nibble of your kibble while you wait. That'll be great. Okay Buddy, we had our sips already. You say the rhyme please.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No you say the rhyme.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Um... Planet of the Mookers, we're the Blue-kers. Planet of the Mookers, we're the Blue-kers. Planet of the Mookers, we're the Blue-kers. And sploop! They splooped right onto...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then the Mooker they met ran right up to them.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh hey, hey again Mooker, said Seeker. We have a problem.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well Buddy the Mouse said...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Remember how there's a kitten and she lost her mom? Her name is Wobbly Whisker and she can't find her mama. Well we found her mom but then she got lost again. And Wobbly Whisker can't find her mom. She figured out that this place was so slimy so she went home. And then unfortunately she couldn't find her mom there so she went to Seeker's castle and then she asked Buddy the Mouse and then she went back home and she couldn't find her mama so she looked on the Planet of the Mookers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well where do you think that cat mama is, friendly Mooker?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well let's go back to the library. That's the last place we saw her. And maybe I can get another fossil book because the fossil Mookers are very interesting. Did you see that Buddy when we were looking at that book? It's amazing. The ancient Mookers were gigantic. And so they went back to the library and they talked to the librarian Mooker and what did she say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: She said Mama Kitten is up there looking all over again for her Wobbly Whisker.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, I'll run up and tell her that Wobbly is at my castle. And so Seeker ran up the stairs and said, "Excuse me Mama Kitten, somehow Wobbly Whisker your kitten ended up at my castle and she's all sticky. Will you come back there with me?"

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Buddy the Mouse.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Buddy the Mouse, yes.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And what did Mama Kitten say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Meow!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well I hope that means okay because I have a going-home potion right here and we're all going to take a sip. Ready? (Sipping sounds). And they got back to Seeker's castle and unfortunately Wobbly Whisker had gotten a little bored and done some mischief in the meantime. What had she done?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, she had rolled around somewhere and got it all sticky. What did she get all sticky?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The rug.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: She got the rug all... sticky, squishy. Wobbly Whisker, you need a bath! But we found your mama. Here's your mama.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And Wobbly Whisker's mama said, "Oh my goodness Wobbly Whisker. Let me take you home for a bath and then it's time for bed."

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, then it's time for squirmies!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Squirmies? Well I think it's the end of Stars and Stories. Are you feeling squirmy Isabella?

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Buddy the Mouse
characters.description: Seeker’s resourceful mouse companion is a keen-eyed problem solver who joined the journey to the planet of the Mookers. Empowered by a transformative new potion, this tiny ally navigates extraterrestrial perils with sharp wit, serving as a vital anchor on their strange cosmic quest.

characters.name: Wobbly Whisker
characters.description: A small kitten who gets lost on the Planet of the Mookers and becomes very sticky.

characters.name: Mama Kitten
characters.description: Wobbly Whiskers’ mother, a figure of maternal persistence, scours the towering, silent stacks of the library on the planet of the Mookers in a tireless search for her lost kitten.

characters.name: Mookers
characters.description: The blue, friendly inhabitants of a very slimy planet.

characters.name: Librarian Mooker
characters.description: A scholarly Mooker resident of the planetary library who serves as an indispensable guide for the heroes, providing the vital intelligence needed to track Mama Kitten’s whereabouts among the labyrinthine stacks.

places.name: Planet of the Mookers
places.description: An enigmatic alien world defined by its fuzzy yet curiously slimy surface, this planet serves as the ancestral cradle of the Mookers and the site of Chicky’s destined path. Strewn with the colossal remains of giant fossils, the realm was recently scouted by Seeker and Buddy and documented in the Seeker’s potion closet; it remains accessible only to those who imbibe a specific purple alchemical elixir.

places.name: Seeker's Castle
places.description: Behind an unassuming facade and a solitary doorbell lies Seeker’s home, a sprawling magical fortress that serves as a vital sanctuary for weary legends. The interior expands into a labyrinthine refuge where an expansive library of mystical books towers beside a potion closet that acts as the true gateway to adventure. This fortress is a hub for calls to action and well-earned rest, where Wobbly Whiskers waits to greet the Seeker and Buddy the Mouse—though the warmth of their homecoming is inevitably punctuated by his latest sticky mess upon the rug.

places.name: The Library
places.description: A location on the Planet of the Mookers where ancient fossil books are kept.
